title: OnlyCube Legends
description: A minecraft RPG modpack designed to extend the duration of the game !
body:
A modpack designed to extend the life length of the game by adding levels and skills to make anything longer to obtain.

This modpack adds lots of biomes and structures to the game to make it more alive!

Tired of wearing the same armor again and again ? You will never have enough new armor to try!

New monster are here to, variant of creepers and endermans depending of the biomes, new bosses and reworked dragon !
